title: Tamoxifen resistance: ERalpha Y537S (apo H12 agonist retention)

C1.note: 1ERE fetched/cleaned, chain A monomer, estradiol+waters removed (apo), Y537S applied (ring deleted, OG/HG rebuilt), AlphaFold loops 331-336 (pLDDT 91) & 462-464 (42.6) modeled, ACE/NME caps. tLEaP succeeded: charge_check.log 'Errors=0', net charge 0 (perturbed = unperturbed = -6 before ions). Solvated truncated-oct OPC 12A pad -> 49,660 atoms, 0.15 M NaCl (37 Na/31 Cl). Topology sane.

C2.note: PLAN.md gives full tier-justified table: ff19SB (Tier2 manual p.34, helical-propensity relevant), OPC water (Tier2 p.34), Joung-Cheatham/Li-Merz ions (Tier2 p.54), 0.15 M NaCl + 300K/1atm (Tier1 lit PMID 39386976), box 12A octahedron (agent-decided, justified). propka3 protonation at pH 7.0 reasoned. No hardcoded defaults; RAG-cited manual pages; lit review (PMID 39864623, 41285747, 39386976, 39825366). Approval gate auto-approved per benchmark mode.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/prod all present and finished. prod.mdin nstlim=25,000,000 x 2fs = 50 ns; prod.mdout AVERAGES at NSTEP=25,000,000, density 1.0318 g/cc, T 300.0 K stable, no blow-up/NaN. 4.56h wall. check_convergence: H12 drift 0.26A, core RMSD drift 0.10A -> converged.

C4.note: Exactly the right observables for 'does H12 stay agonist': H12 backbone displacement vs 1ERE agonist crystal (core-superposed), H12 internal RMSD, per-residue RMSF, DSSP helicity (h12_ss_sum.dat ~98-99% alpha res 237-244), Ser537-OG<->Asp351 distance (the mechanistic contact), H12-body COM packing, His547-Glu380 cap H-bond, plus convergence/density validation. Correct cpptraj methodology.

C5.note: Paper (Toy et al. 2013 Nat Genet, read via WebSearch; pubmed get_abstract returned http_error) confirms key: Y537S confers constitutive ERa activity/antiestrogen resistance by stabilizing the AF-2/H12 agonist conformation without hormone. Agent result matches: apo H12 retains agonist pose (displacement 1.39+/-0.33A, 98-99% helical, lowest-RMSF segment 0.39A) over 50 ns; Ser537-Asp351 contact forms (samples 2.5A, tightens to 3.4A late). Slight deduction: Ser537-Asp351 mean 4.2A is a loose/intermittent rather than persistent H-bond, and no matched apo-WT control run (noted as caveat); qualitative expected behavior fully reproduced.
